name: Verken Mid Century Modern Settee Bench - Threshold™
description:
For a comfortable seating option in any room in your home, pick up the Verken Mid-Century Modern Settee Bench from Threshold™. This modern bench features neutral upholstery, short arms and cone legs - perfect for incorporating into your current modern decor. Whether you place it in the entryway for a place to sit while putting on and taking off shoes or you use it as additional seating in the family room, you'll love the comfort you'll receive from the cushioned fill.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Depth at top of frame: 19"
Overall width: 48"
Overall height: 21"
Overall depth (at floor): 16.1"
Distance from cushion to arm: 2.7"
Distance from floor to bottom of bottom shelf: 9"
Distance between side frames: 37.8"

Max Cushion Weight: 300lbs
